mode: ask
description: Design a new lab outline for MongoDB agent training
---

[agents/lab-outline-designer.md](../../agents/lab-outline-designer.md)

Design a new lab outline using the agent definition above.

**Fill in before running:**
- Topic or capability: [what MongoDB concept or workflow should the lab teach?]
- Target audience: [e.g., SQL developer new to MongoDB]
- Environment: [Instruqt / local VS Code / Codespaces]
- Constraints: [tooling, language, out-of-scope topics — leave blank for defaults]

Output saves to `lab-specs/{name}-outline.md`.
